---
title: "Sofia Sarak"
image: images/channel_headshot.jpg
about:
  template: trestles
  image-shape: round
  #image-width: 
  links:
    - text: LinkedIn
      icon: linkedin
      href: https://linkedin.com/in/sofiasarak
      target: _blank # ensures that link is opened in a new browser tab
    - text: GitHub
      icon: github
      href: https://github.com/sofiasarak
      target: -blank
    - text: Email
      icon: envelope
      href: mailto:sarak@ucsb.edu
---

<h1>Welcome! I'm Sofia. </h1>

I am an early-career data scientist currently completing a Master of Environmental Data Science at the Bren School of Environmental Science & Management at UCSB (whew, that was a mouthful). I am still finding my niche, but I am currently enjoying learning data visualization methods, geospatial analysis, and environmental policy evaluation.

::: panel-tabset
### Education

**Master of Environmental Data Science** (Expected June 2026) <br>Bren School of Environmental Science & Management @ University of California, Santa Barbara (UCSB)

**Bachelor of Arts in Earth & Environmental Sciences, Economics** (May 2025) <br> Wesleyan University @ Middletown, CT

### Experience

*To be updated*

### Fun Facts!

1. I'm first-generation American, which has showed me the importance of language for communication and connection. **I grew up speaking Russian and Ukrainian at home**, and am very determined to not lose the Spanish I learned in high school and college.

2. **I love to read!** Some recent favorites include [Educated](https://www.goodreads.com/book/show/35133922-educated) by Tara Westover and [Happy City](https://www.goodreads.com/book/show/13330588-happy-city?from_search=true&from_srp=true&qid=K5OBEgo4XG&rank=1) by Charles Montgomery.

3. When I'm not coding, practicing my Spanish, or reading, I'm probably doing some sort of physical activity. Like many environmental scientists **I enjoy hiking, but I'm also a big fan of weightlifting and swimming laps at the pool**.
:::
